zh.lifeSummary: 當Princess Sophia von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel of Brunswick於1340年出生在德國布勞恩史維藍德可萊斯 沃爾分比特爾時，她的父親Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel36歲，母親Sophia von Brandenburg37歲。她與Dietrich Vi of Honstein結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1394年在她的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Princess Sophia von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel of Brunswick于1340年出生在德国布勞恩史維藍德可萊斯 沃爾分比特爾时，她的父亲Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel36岁，母亲Sophia von Brandenburg37岁。她与Dietrich Vi of Honstein结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1394年在她的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sophia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek word meaning ‘wisdom’. The Eastern cult of  St Sophia  arose as a result of misinterpretation of the phrase Hagia Sophia ‘holy wisdom’ as if it meant ‘St Sophia’. The name became popular in England in the 17th and 18th centuries—the heroine of  Fielding's  novel Tom Jones (  1749 ) is called  Sophia Weston—and  has been increasing in popularity since the 1990s. In Scotland it has been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Beathag .

en.lifeSummary: When Princess Sophia von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel of Brunswick was born in 1340, in Wolfenbüttel, Brunswick, Germany, her father, Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel, was 36 and her mother, Sophia von Brandenburg, was 37. She married Dietrich Vi of Honstein. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1394, in her hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princess Sophia von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel of Brunswick est née en 1340, à Landkreis Wolfenbüttel, Braunschweig, Allemagne, son père, Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Sophia von Brandenburg, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Dietrich Vi of Honstein. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1394, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Princess Sophia von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel of Brunswick 1340 in Landkreis Wolfenbüttel, Braunschweig, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel 36 und ihre Mutter Sophia von Brandenburg 37. Sie hat Dietrich Vi of Honstein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1394 im Alter von 54 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Sophia von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel of Brunswick è nata il nel 1340 nel Landkreis Wolfenbüttel, Braunschweig, Germania, sua padre, Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Sophia von Brandenburg, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Dietrich Vi of Honstein. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1394, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Princess Sophia von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel of Brunswickが1340年にドイツブラウンスチウエイグランドクレイス ウオルフエンブuッテルで生まれた時，父Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttelは36歳，母Sophia von Brandenburgは37歳であった。Dietrich Vi of Honsteinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1394年に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Princess Sophia von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel of Brunswick(이)가 1340년 독일 브라슈위그 랜드크레이스 울펜브u텔에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sophia von Brandenburg(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 Dietrich Vi of Honstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1394년 그녀의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Sophia von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel of Brunswick nasceu em 1340, em Landkreis Wolfenbüttel, Braunschweig, Alemanha, seu pai, Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Sophia von Brandenburg, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Dietrich Vi of Honstein. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1394, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princess Sophia von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel of Brunswick родилась в 1340 г. в местности ландкрис волфенбuттел, браунщвиг, Германия, её отцу по имени Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Sophia von Brandenburg, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Dietrich Vi of Honstein. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1394 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Princess Sophia von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel of Brunswick nació en 1340, en Landkreis Wolfenbüttel, Braunschweig, Alemania, su papá, Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Sophia von Brandenburg, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Dietrich Vi of Honstein. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1394, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años.
